audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() can return NULL on memory allocation failure, but random_info[0] is dereferenced at L2078 without NULL check. Additional dereference at L2127 also unprotected.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers memory pressure causing AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() to return NULL, leading to segmentation fault via null pointer dereference at GetRandomSecretKey(random_info[0]).
